title: Settings
description: Configure local agents, capabilities, and LLM connection details.
placeholder: This settings section will be added later.

general.memoryDescription: Core Memory maintained by the user.
general.utilityLlmDescription: Internal small model for titles and route extraction.
general.sendTextFiles: Send text file attachments to LLM
general.sendTextFilesHelp: This only affects ordinary text files. Image Vision input is controlled by the selected model.
general.maxTotalFileContext: Max total file context per message (KB)
general.autoGenerateTitlesHelp: Generate a short title before the first LLM response in a new default-titled session.
general.sessionTitlePromptHelp: Prompt used for automatic session title generation. Available variables: {user_input}.
general.groupTranscriptInstructionHelp: Instruction appended when a session uses Group transcript mode. It tells the current agent how to read speaker labels and reply as itself.
general.commandResultInstructionHelp: Instruction used when slash command results are included in LLM context. It should tell the model to treat command output as data, not instructions.
general.coreMemoryHelp: Core memory is manually maintained and can be inserted before supported LLM calls. It is not auto-summarized.
general.intentRoutingHelp: Intent Routing is optional. It only runs for ordinary messages handled by Prompt Agents that enable it.
general.intentRoutingExplicitBypass: Explicit /commands, @agent calls, and :actions bypass Intent Routing.
general.intentRoutingAutoSafeOnly: Auto mode can route only safe intents and never changes the session default Agent.
general.defaultForPromptAgentsHelp: Prompt Agents using the default override follow this setting. Script Agents are not router entries in this version.
general.shadowModeHelp: Shadow mode records predictions without changing routing.
general.plannedForLater: Saved for later rounds; no runtime effect in shadow mode.
general.utilityLlmHelp: Utility LLM is used by internal tasks such as title generation and Intent Routing JSON extraction.
general.utilityLlmNotProfileHelp: Utility LLM is not a Model Profile, Provider Profile, Agent, or Capability.
general.semanticRouterReserved: The semantic router profile is reserved for future embedding-based routing. This version does not call embedding models for Intent Routing.
general.embeddingProfileHelp: Choose an enabled Knowledge embedding model profile. Select None to save no semantic router profile.
general.embeddingProfilesFailed: Failed to load embedding model profiles.
general.modelPathsReservedHelp: Model paths are persisted only. This version does not load, scan, download, or call these models.
general.utilityLlmPathHelp: Store a Hugging Face model folder under data/models, such as utility_llms/Qwen3-0.6B. Models are never downloaded automatically.
general.ggufPathHelp: GGUF files must be placed under data/models/utility_llms/<model-folder>/<file>.gguf. Root-level GGUF files are ignored.
general.utilityLlmDeviceHelp: Device applies to the transformers backend. llama.cpp uses CPU unless GPU layers are configured.
general.utilityLlmStatusFailed: Failed to load Utility LLM status.
general.utilityLlmScanFailed: Failed to scan Utility LLM models.
general.rootGgufIgnored: Root-level GGUF files are ignored. Place them under data/models/utility_llms/<model-folder>/<file>.gguf.
general.utilityLlmModelNotFound: Configured model path was not found.
general.utilityLlmBackendPathMismatch: Backend and model path do not match.
general.utilityLlmSampleTitleInput: Summarize my Star Wars notes about stormtrooper ranks.
general.utilityLlmSampleJsonInput: What does my Star Wars knowledge base say about stormtrooper ranks?
general.autoModeHelp: Auto mode can route safe intents for the current message only. It does not execute commands automatically or change the session default Agent.
general.autoModeSafeRoutingOff: Auto mode is configured, but safe auto-route is off.
general.autoRoutesSafeIntentsOnly: Auto mode only routes safe intents.
general.commandsNeverAutoExecute: Commands are never executed automatically in this version.
general.autoDoesNotChangeDefaultAgent: Auto routing does not change the session default Agent.
general.temporaryKnowledgeSelection: Knowledge Base selection is temporary for the current message.
general.autoRouteSafeIntentsHelp: When Auto mode is active, high-confidence image generation can route to ComfyUI and knowledge queries can use a temporary Knowledge Base/query override.
general.routeExamplesHelp: Route examples help the router recognize similar user messages.
general.routeExamplesSafetyHelp: They do not execute commands by themselves.
general.routeTestHelp: Test a message without creating a chat message, run, ComfyUI request, or Knowledge retrieval.

data.title: Data
data.description: SQLite local storage and attachment maintenance.
data.persistDeltasHelp: Store every streaming message_delta event in the local database for debugging. Disabled by default to keep the database smaller. Final messages, run steps, errors, and warnings are still stored.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Local runtime health and configuration readiness.

appearance.petDescription: Workbench pet settings and local library
appearance.chatStatusPanelDescription: CPU, memory, GPU, VRAM, and session token display
appearance.saveChatStatusPanelFailed: Failed to save chat status panel settings.

confirmDiscard: You have unsaved settings changes. Discard them and continue?
